prose:
Fukui reactivity analysis of furan (C₄H₄O) was performed using DFT at the B3LYP/def2-TZVP level (tier standard, density-fitted) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Fukui indices (f⁺, f⁻, f⁰) and dual descriptors were computed via finite-difference of Mulliken charges evaluated at the neutral, cationic (+1), and anionic (−1) states. All SCF calculations converged. The most electrophilic site is the β-carbon (C4, index 5 in 1-based numbering) with f⁺ = **1.924** (shown as the headline value). The most nucleophilic site is also at C4 with f⁻ = 0.162. These results are consistent with the experimentally known regioselectivity of furan toward electrophilic aromatic substitution at the β-positions. Mulliken charge scheme was used. Integrity check: trustworthy (charge conservation passed for both f⁺ and f⁻).</prose>
<parameter name="integrity_trustworthy">true
